payload.answer: Record one memory only despite the same input being delivered three times.
citations: Input: Same input delivered three times: Sam from Goldman mentioned that he likes Bill Evans.

entity_resolution.reason: Sam is under-specified; 'Goldman' may refer to an organization such as Goldman Sachs, but the input does not uniquely identify the entity. Do not create duplicates from repeated identical delivery.

memory_cards.statement: Sam from Goldman mentioned that he likes Bill Evans.

details: Accepted a single durable memory card for the repeated identical message.
Preserved ambiguity around Sam and Goldman.
